description: All flags true, moderate realistic metrics, no delays — baseline happy path
All flags true, both start and end delays present — tests delay bolding in P3
isPreviousAuditAvailable=false — P1 must be completely absent
isPreviousAuditAvailable=true, isPreviousScheduleAvailable=false — P1 present, P2 shows only current auditor
Both isPreviousAuditAvailable=false and isPreviousScheduleAvailable=false — only P2 (current only) and P3 generated
100% rectification rate, 0 recurring issues, 0% recurrence — tests zero-value handling and bold suppression
0% rectification, 100% recurrence rate, very low completionPct (<80%), very low compliance score — tests all bold triggers
0 total issues found, high completion, 0% issueFoundPct — mandatory zero must be reported, not omitted
completionPct below 80% with all other fields normal — tests completionPct bold trigger
Observation and recommendation are empty strings for both schedules; auditComplianceScore is empty string — tests None recorded substitution and Not Available for compliance score
